Now that we've went over how to create an account, I'm going to give you a real quick tour of your click funnels. So right now we're on the dashboard. Depending on the membership that you chose, you may have an action edX or backpack option. If you don't, that's totally okay. You're going to live mainly inside of this area right here, the click funnels. So before we click on that, I do want to show you the two templates that we have available for you to edit. We have both a 42 day detox funnel. So I'm going to go ahead and show you this and it's all editable. So you'll see like this area right here we would want to remove. But this funnel looks a little bit like this. And then you would just enter in your information in the templates and we'll go over how to do that in just a moment. We also have a six week challenge membership. And so this one looks like this also completely editable. And so it's completely up to you which one of these funnels you want to use, which everyone makes you happy is the one you should use. So inside of the portal, so where we are directly below this video, you should have two buttons to either import the six week challenge funnel or the 42 day detox. Personally, I like the 42 day detox. So I'm going to start with importing that one. So all you have to do to import a funnel from us is just click on the button. So it'll show you everything loading up. And then from here you can either click on view funnel, or you can click over here on all funnels. So you'll see that we have a ton of funnels in here. You probably will not have as many. That's totally okay. So from here, we're going to go ahead and click on the funnel. And it's going to bring it up. So we need to edit this funnel so that it has your personal information instead of the template. But in order to do this, you will need to link your funnel up to a domain name. So we'll be going over how to get a domain in our next video.
